<!-- What actually happened -->

## Reproducibility
- [ ] Happens every time
- [ ] Happens occasionally
- [ ] Happens once

## Severity
- [ ] Critical (app crashes, data loss)
- [ ] High (major feature broken)
- [ ] Medium (feature partially broken)
- [ ] Low (minor issue, workaround exists)
